name: Gumroad Product Stats
description: Downloads all product data from your Gumroad account and shows a revenue chart.

input_schema.name: GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN
input_schema.label: Gumroad access token env var name
input_schema.description: Name of the environment variable holding your Gumroad API access token

input_schema.name: published_only
input_schema.label: Published only
input_schema.description: When true, only include published products. When false, include all products.
